name: Macro Oracle
description: Structured macroeconomic data for AI agents. Brazil (BCB, IBGE, COPOM) and global central banks (Fed, ECB, BoJ). Pay-per-call via x402 in USDC on Base mainnet.

tools.name: brazil_selic
tools.description: SELIC current rate + Focus expectations + next COPOM date + historical surprises

tools.name: brazil_ipca
tools.description: IPCA realized inflation + Focus expectations + next release date + historical surprises

tools.name: brazil_copom_calendar
tools.description: COPOM meeting calendar + implied probabilities of cut / hold / hike

tools.name: brazil_focus_snapshot
tools.description: Full Focus snapshot: IPCA, SELIC, GDP, FX + weekly changes + signal_for_agents

tools.name: brazil_surprise_index
tools.description: Brazil macro surprise index (z-score vs consensus) + polymarket_relevance score

tools.name: global_calendar
tools.description: Next 30 days: FOMC, ECB, BoJ, BCB, NFP, CPI with consensus and probabilities

tools.name: global_fomc
tools.description: Fed: current rate + CME FedWatch probabilities + dot plot + historical surprises

tools.name: global_surprise_matrix
tools.description: Macro surprises last 30 days for US/EU/BR/JP/CN + polymarket_signals
